title: Flag whether the evidence answers the LP question
guidance: Reward honest gap-spotting and naming the missing element.

runner_input.instruction: Say whether the evidence fully answers, partly answers, or leaves a gap — and what's missing.
runner_input.constraints: Verdict + the specific missing element if not full.

source_blocks.text: LP question: 'What is the firm's track record on DEI at the portfolio-company board level, with data?'

items: Evidence: a narrative paragraph on the firm's commitment to diversity
One anecdote about a single portfolio company

rubric_notes: Verdict: gap. The question asks for board-level data; only narrative + one anecdote is provided.
